(Take $$\pi=\frac{22}{7}$$)

The block is pushed by a horizontal force of 0.1 N and moves with a constant speed. IF the viscosity of the liquid is $$5.0\times10^{-3}~\mathrm{Pl}$$, the speed of block is ____________ $$\times10^{-3}$$ m/s.

subject: Physics
question_text:

(Given for dielectric media, $$\mu_r=1$$)

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Electric Potential Energy And Electric Potential
question_text:
For a charged spherical ball, electrostatic potential inside the ball varies with $$r$$ as $$\mathrm{V}=2ar^2+b$$.
Here, $$a$$ and $$b$$ are constant and r is the distance from the center. The volume charge density inside the ball is $$-\lambda a\varepsilon$$. The value of $$\lambda$$ is ____________.
$$\varepsilon$$ = permittivity of the medium

subject: Physics
question_text: When two resistance $$\mathrm{R_1}$$ and $$\mathrm{R_2}$$ connected in series and introduced into the left gap of a meter bridge and a resistance of 10 $$\Omega$$ is introduced into the right gap, a null point is found at 60 cm from left side. When $$\mathrm{R_1}$$ and $$\mathrm{R_2}$$ are connected in parallel and introduced into the left gap, a resistance of 3 $$\Omega$$ is introduced into the right gap to get null point at 40 cm from left end. The product of $$\mathrm{R_1}$$ $$\mathrm{R_2}$$ is ____________$$\Omega^2$$
